title: Feature-gate the operator/recovery seam off the default Rust facade (Option B); method-level governed-surface enforcement; AC-050c green
resolves: Slice 27 codex [P1] (governed_surface.rs audited TYPES not Engine METHODS → AC-074 recovery-denylist + no-raw-SQL falsely green for Rust). Verdict: dev/plans/runs/0.8.0-slice-27-review-20260605T215557Z.md. HITL chose Option B (2026-06-05).

commits.summary: design memo — operator-seam feature gate (Option B); exact gated set; feature-unification doctest plan; AC-050c plan; no-binding-calls verification
RED — cfg-gated compile_fail method-absence doctests; 3 operator absence doctests FAIL (methods still reachable); AC-050c baseline FAIL (Slice-25 residue)

GREEN — operator feature gates 12 methods + 6 private helpers + 7 imports/const in engine; example required-features; facade splits 17 governed / 20 operator re-exports; CLI enables operator; reexports.rs trimmed; governed_surface.rs WITH-feature positive check
rust.md default-vs-operator method-level boundary; AC-074 Rust clause tightened to method-level + feature-gated
AC-050c green — scope tests/ out of the public-API removal-detect scanner (+ tests-excluded self-test fixture); CHANGELOG ### Changed operator-gate note
DOC-INDEX — add fix-1 design memo row; refresh rust.md + acceptance.md rows
accurate raw-SQL release-pin doc comment (engine cfg-gate canonical; rustdoc may not re-run with debug-assertions off)

findings_addressed: [P1] resolved: the DEFAULT fathomdb::Engine no longer exposes rebuild_projections/rebuild_vec0 (recovery-denylist names) — they are operator-gated; enforced at the METHOD level by compile_fail doctests that now pass.

execute_for_test (raw SQL) is release-absent (engine #[cfg(debug_assertions)] gate; verified: symbol absent from target/release/libfathomdb_engine.rlib); pinned by a documented release-surface doctest.
AC-050c removal-detect now rc=0: scoped tests/ out of the public-API scanner (the principled fix), clearing the pre-existing Slice-25 test_surface.py residue in the same pass.

tdd_evidence.red_evidence: cargo test -p fathomdb --doc: governed_surface_method_absence_proof lines 32/39/46 FAILED ('Test compiled successfully, but it's marked compile_fail') — operator methods still reachable on the default facade. AC-050c rc=1 (Slice-25 residue).
tdd_evidence.green_evidence: cargo test -p fathomdb (default): 3 absence doctests PASS, governed_surface 3/3, reexports + byte-frozen no_recovery_surface green. cargo test -p fathomdb --features operator: t_074_operator_seam_resolves_with_feature PASS. cargo test -p fathomdb-cli green. cargo test --workspace: 94 suites, 0 failures (feature-unification handled).

gated_surface.cli_opt_in: fathomdb-cli depends on fathomdb with features = ["operator"]
gated_surface.default_governed_surface: 17 governed types + open/write/search/close + instrumentation methods; recovery-name-free + raw-SQL-free at the method level

ac_050c_result.mechanism: (b) scope tests/ directories out of scripts/security/check_removal_changelog.py via a `/tests/`-in-path predicate in _classify; added a tests-excluded self-test fixture + harness case. Test functions are not public API; this also clears the pre-existing Slice-25 residue. This fix introduced no new public-API removals (the operator gating adds attributes/feature-gated `pub use`, which the scanner regex does not match — confirmed empirically).
ac_050c_result.scanner_self_test: scripts/tests/test_removal_detect.sh: all cases pass (clean, undocumented, moved-in-file, tests-excluded, default-base-ref live-git)

build_results.cargo_test_p_fathomdb_default: PASS (3 method-absence doctests + governed_surface 3/3 + reexports + byte-frozen no_recovery_surface)
build_results.cargo_test_p_fathomdb_release: PASS (debug method-absence doctests run; raw-SQL release doctest is a documented pin — rustdoc may not re-run with debug-assertions off; execute_for_test verified absent from release rlib)
build_results.cargo_test_workspace: PASS (94 'test result: ok' suites, 0 failures; operator unified ON via CLI — absence doctests correctly skipped under unification)
build_results.cargo_clippy_workspace_all_targets_Dwarn: PASS (default); engine default + --features operator both clean

no_binding_or_non_cli_consumer_calls_a_g: VERIFIED — grep of src/rust: all 12 methods are CLI-only except trace_source_ref (also fathomdb-engine/examples/ingest_corpus.rs, handled via required-features); no fathomdb-py / fathomdb-napi reference; no internal engine self-call.

agent_verify_result.typecheck: PASS (cargo check --workspace; pyright run manually = 0 errors / 31 env warnings on the unbuilt native ext; ts skipped in worktree)
agent_verify_result.AC-037_netns: BLOCKER (toolchain missing: rootless userns+netns unavailable) — environmental, acknowledged §4, CI-covered at Slice 40.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: ingest_corpus example marked required-features = ["operator"] (it calls the now-gated trace_source_ref).

fathomdb-engine import/const splits so the default build is dead-code-free under -D warnings (MeanRecomputeTrigger, sha2::Digest, CANONICAL_TABLES, REBUILD_DRAIN_TIMEOUT_MS, hex_encode/hex_nibble, collect_integrity_check_findings, locator_from_rusqlite_error, read_schema_objects, order_canonical_first).
next_step_for_orchestrator: Slice 27 fix-1 merged at <merge sha>; re-review with codex (base 1c0d1b4 or current main); on PASS close Slice 27. Note: AC-037 netns remains the only non-green (environmental, CI at Slice 40). The raw-SQL release doctest is a documented pin (engine #[cfg(debug_assertions)] gate is canonical; verified symbol-absent in release rlib) — flag if a stricter CI-enforced release-surface assertion is wanted (would need trybuild or a RUSTDOCFLAGS no-debug-assertions doc run).
